sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n109175" key="u(po/speira" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπόσπειρα</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n109175.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a kind of hair-dressing,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:2:31" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.31</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
